Page.title: About
Page._content:
# Summary
Lixia Zhou, a graduate student in the field of electrical and computer engineering, aiming to become an excellent engineer. Master skills in *analog and digital circuit design*, *embedded software development*, *web development*. Currently focusing on the fields of *telecommunications and information security*.
# Education
### MEng - Telecommunications and Information Security | University of Victoria | Sep. 2023 - present 
**Core Course:**
- Design and Analysis of Computer Communication Networks
- IOT: Analytics and Security
- Deep Reinforcement Learning
### BEng - Electronic and Information Engineering | Southwest Jiaotong University | Sep. 2019 – Jun. 2023    
**Core Course:**
- Computer Networks
- Data Structure and Algorithm Design
- Software Comprehensive Experiments
- Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
- Big Data Technology, Computer Graphics  

**Award:**
- Outstanding Student Cadres
- Merit Student
- National Encouragement Scholarship

# Contact
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lixia-zhou-50a547260/
- Email: alyssazhoulx@gmail.com

Post.title: Embedded Software Assistant Engineer | APsystems Technology Co., Ltd
Post._content:
- Was responsible for functional development and maintenance of Linux-based energy controllers.
- Designed and implemented an algorithm to synchronize multiple devices to regulate inverter current using 485 serial communications.
- Collaborated with testers to debug the device's flaws and upgraded the system.
- Wrote internal test software for monitoring equipment parameters.
Post.raw:
---
title: Embedded Software Assistant Engineer | APsystems Technology Co., Ltd
date: 2023-04-17
tags: [team work, C++, Linux, Qt, software develepment, 485 serial communications]
category: Work Experience
---
- Was responsible for functional development and maintenance of Linux-based energy controllers.
- Designed and implemented an algorithm to synchronize multiple devices to regulate inverter current using 485 serial communications.
- Collaborated with testers to debug the device's flaws and upgraded the system.
- Wrote internal test software for monitoring equipment parameters.
Post.content:
• Was responsible for functional development and maintenance of Linux-based energy controllers.
  • Designed and implemented an algorithm to synchronize multiple devices to regulate inverter current using 485 serial communications.
  • Collaborated with testers to debug the device’s flaws and upgraded the system.
  • Wrote internal test software for monitoring equipment parameters.

Post.title: Research Training Program - Development of Automatic Train Driving Device Based on Safety Computer Platform
Post._content:
- Worked with a team of Train Control & Traction Drive Lab at Southwest Jiaotong University.
- Contributed to the physical model of the train and analyzed its performance.
- Completed the MatLab program to simulate the model we built, and found the parameters that make the model work best.
- Helped to install the automatic train driving device and tested it.
- Participate in the preparation of related papers which was helpful to the successful conclusion of the research.
Post.raw:
---

Post.title: Embedded Software Developer | Sichuan Hwadee Information Technology Co., Ltd
Post._content:
- Was responsible for the development of a video recording system based on the ARM platform.
- Compiled the system design scheme and planned the functional modules according to the product requirements.
- Finished the software program of video storage and playback module with C++ independently and transplanted the algorithm to the ARM platform.
- Designed test cases, did the unit tests, and tested the whole machine.
- Contributed to the design document and user guidance.
Post.raw:
---
title: Embedded Software Developer | Sichuan Hwadee Information Technology Co., Ltd
date: 2022-08-01
tags: [team work, C++, Linux, Qt, leadership, software develepment]
category: Work Experience
---
- Was responsible for the development of a video recording system based on the ARM platform.
- Compiled the system design scheme and planned the functional modules according to the product requirements.
- Finished the software program of video storage and playback module with C++ independently and transplanted the algorithm to the ARM platform.
- Designed test cases, did the unit tests, and tested the whole machine.
- Contributed to the design document and user guidance.
Post.content:
• Was responsible for the development of a video recording system based on the ARM platform.
  • Compiled the system design scheme and planned the functional modules according to the product requirements.
  • Finished the software program of video storage and playback module with C++ independently and transplanted the algorithm to the ARM platform.
  • Designed test cases, did the unit tests, and tested the whole machine.
  • Contributed to the design document and user guidance.

Post.title: Team Captain | Debating Team of the School of Electrical Engineering
Post._content:
- Hosted and planned over 30 competitions and events such as college debate competitions, freshman meetings and appealed over 300 people to participate cumulatively.
- Provided more than 10 debate skills training and competition guidance workshops to members. Helped the team win over 10 school-level debate competitions.
- Organized team meetings by communicating with team members and leading meetings.
Post.raw:
---
title: Team Captain | Debating Team of the School of Electrical Engineering

Post.title: Java Backend Developer | Campus Second-Hand Buy and Sell Application
Post._content:
- Was responsible for the design, development, and unit testing of both the database and backend APIs. 
- Designed the data structure according to project requirements and maintained the Mysql database.
- Developed RESTful APIs using Java and Spring Boot, and cooperated with the front-end developer to debug. 
- Created and updated documentation in support of development efforts.
- Participated in code reviews to make sure the code is well-designed, self-documented, testable, secure, and efficient.
Post.raw:
---
title: Java Backend Developer | Campus Second-Hand Buy and Sell Application
date: 2022-09-01
